# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest deployed version of [tomflidr.cz](https://tomflidr.cz) is
actively maintained.

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub Issues.**

Send a report by e-mail to **info@tomflidr.cz** with:

- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact
- Steps to reproduce or a proof-of-concept (if applicable)
- Affected URL(s) or component(s)

You will receive an acknowledgement within **3 business days**.  
Fixes are typically deployed within **14 days** of confirmation.

After the issue is resolved, a brief disclosure note may be added here.

## Scope

In scope:

- XSS, CSRF, injection vulnerabilities
- Authentication / session issues
- Information disclosure (e.g. leaking private configuration values)
- Server-side request forgery

Out of scope:

- Issues in third-party libraries that are already publicly known
- Theoretical vulnerabilities without a working proof-of-concept
- Automated scanner findings without manual verification
